NumberOfExpansionJoints.description: The number of expansion joints for the building

BuildingLateralSystem.description: The type of lateral system the building uses

DiaphragmLoadingWindY_plf.description: this is in ult. multiply by .6 for asd

DiaphragmLoadingWindX_plf.description: this is in ult. multiply by .6 for asd

DiaphragmLoadingSeismic_plf.description: this is in ult. multiply by .7 for asd

DiaphragmLoadWindY_k.description: this is in ult. multiply by .6 for asd

DiaphragmLoadWindX_k.description: this is in ult. multiply by .6 for asd

DiaphragmLoadSeismic_k.description: this is in ult. multiply by .7 for asd

AvgLateralShearEJ_k.description: this is in ult. multiply by .6 for asd

FrameMinBeamDepthIn.description: Min designed beam depth across all frame lines (in).

FrameMaxBeamDepthIn.description: Max designed beam depth across all frame lines (in).

FrameBeamUnbracedLengthFt.description: Governing (max) designed beam unbraced length for sizing (ft).

FrameFootingRebarSize.description: Governing frame footing rebar bar size (e.g. 7 for #7).

BracedFrameMinColumnThicknessIn.description: Min designed braced-frame column wall thickness (in).

MomentFrameTotalBays.description: Total number of bays across all moment frame lines.

MomentFrameShearPerLineK.description: Average lateral shear per moment frame line (k).

MomentFrameMaxLoadPerBayK.description: Max lateral load per bay across moment frame lines (k).

LateralForceRatioFrameToWall.description: Ratio of total lateral reaction taken by frames vs walls.

BracedFrameBaysToFirst.description: Bays from the nearest building edge to the first braced frame line.

MomentFrameBaysToFirst.description: Bays from the nearest building edge to the first moment frame line.
